wordplay_note: Son of the church thrust into a pagan future
card_description: Dr. Futurity (Jim Parsons) (meaning "Parsons = parson's son") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Dr. Futurity*. Doctor transported to a future society that worships death and rejects medicine. Name note: Son of the church thrust into a pagan future. The healer as anachronism — compassion outlawed. First appears in *Dr. Futurity*.

reference.brief: Doctor transported to a future society that worships death and rejects medicine
reference.significance: The healer as anachronism — compassion outlawed
